passive.name: Sap Magic
passive.description: Maokai's basic attack also heals him and deals additional damage on a moderate cooldown. Each time Maokai casts a spell or is struck by an enemy's spell, this cooldown is reduced.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} Periodically, {{cis|Maokai}} next basic attack will {{tip|heal}} him for a portion of {{as|his '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Each time '''Maokai''' casts an ability or is hit by an enemy ability, ''Sap Magic'' cooldown is {{sti|cdr|reduced}} by a few seconds.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} Periodically, '''Maokai''' empowers his next [[basic attack]] to have an {{tip|uncancellable windup}} and {{tip|heal}} him for {{as|{{pp|4;4.2;4.4;4.8;5;5.65;6.3;6.95;7.6;8.25;8.9;9.55;10.2;10.85;11.5;12.15;12.8|key=%}} '''maximum''' health}} after a {{tt|{{fd|0.25}}|Reduced by attack speed.}}-second delay.
wiki_detail.description2: Each time '''Maokai''' casts an [[Champion ability|ability]], hits at least one enemy champion or epic monster with ''{{ai|Sapling Toss|Maokai}}'', or is struck by an enemy's ability, ''Sap Magic's'' {{sti|cooldown}} is reduced by 4 seconds, modified to {{fd|1.5}} if he is hit by a large {{tip|monster|monster's}} basic attack or ability.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Sap Magic {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Maokai's''' basic attack timer, and will not trigger if he is above {{sti|{{as|95% '''maximum''' health}}}}.''
wiki_detail.knockdown:
|notes            = 
* ''Sap Magic'' does not occur if the attack is {{tip|dodge|dodged}} and/or missed if '''Maokai''' is {{tip|blind|blinded}}. It will occur if it is {{tip|block|blocked}}.
* The striking ability has to trigger [[ability effects|spell effects]] such as {{tip|spell damage}} or {{tip|area damage}} for the cooldown to be reduced.
* If '''Maokai''' possesses a {{tip|spell shield}} and it consumes an enemy ability, he will still receive the cooldown reduction.
* The empowered attack will not trigger against [[structures]] nor [[ward]]s.

Q.name: Bramble Smash
Q.description: Maokai knocks back nearby enemies with a shockwave, dealing magic damage and slowing them.
Q.tooltip: Maokai smashes his fist into the ground, dealing {{ totaldamage }} plus {{ basepercenthealth*100 }}% max Health magic damage and briefly Slowing. Nearby enemies are also Knocked Back.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Maokai}} sends a shockwave in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} and briefly {{tip|slow|slows}} enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Enemies near '''Maokai''' are also briefly {{tip|stun|stunned}} and {{tip|airborne|knocked back}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Maokai''' sends a shockwave in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|slow|slows}} them by 99% for {{fd|0.25}} seconds. ''Bramble Smash'' deals {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} to {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|65 to 245}} {{as|(+ {{ap|2 to 4}}% of the target's '''maximum''' health)}} {{as|(+ 40% AP)}}}}
{{st|Bonus Monster Damage|{{ap|120 to 160}}|Total Monster Damage|{{ap|65+120 to 245+160}} {{as|(+ {{ap|2 to 4}}% of the target's '''maximum''' health)}} {{as|(+ 40% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: Enemies near '''Maokai''' are also {{tip|stun|stunned}} for {{fd|0.5}} seconds and {{tip|airborne|knocked back}} up to 300 units based on their proximity to him.

W.name: Twisted Advance
W.description: Maokai contorts into a mass of moving roots, becoming untargetable and dashing to the target. Upon arrival, he roots the target.
W.tooltip: Maokai transforms into a moving mass of roots, becoming Untargetable and dashing to an enemy. Upon arrival, he Roots the enemy for {{ e2 }} second(s) and deals {{ totaldamage }} magic damage. {{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Maokai}} {{tip|dashes}} to the target enemy while being {{tip|untargetable}}, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and briefly {{tip|root|rooting}} them upon arrival.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Maokai''' {{tip|dashes}} to the target enemy while being {{tip|untargetable}}. Upon arrival, he deals {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|root|roots}} them for a duration.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|60 to 160}} {{as|(+ 40% AP)}}}}
{{st|Root Duration|{{ap|1 to 1.4}} seconds}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Maokai''' will track the target if they change locations.
** He will dash to the target's previous location without applying ''Twisted Advance's'' effects if the target is too far away or moves beyond {{tt|2000|Estimated}} units.
** He will stop dashing if the target is too far away the moment the dash begins.
* ''Twisted Advance'' will fail to deal damage and apply the {{tip|root}} if the target is {{tip|untargetable}} upon arrival.

E.name: Sapling Toss
E.description: Maokai flings a sapling to the target area to stand guard. More effective in brush.
E.tooltip:
Maokai flings a sapling, which stands watch for {{ saplingduration }} seconds. Saplings chase nearby enemies, detonating on arrival to deal {{ totaldamage }} magic damage and Slow surrounding enemies by {{ slowamount*100 }}% for {{ slowduration }} seconds. Sap Magic's Cooldown is reduced by an additional 4 seconds if the sapling hits an enemy champion or epic monster.

If placed in brush, Saplings instead last for {{ empoweredsaplingduration }} seconds and cause a larger explosion, dealing {{ totalempowereddamage }} magic damage over {{ empowereddotduration }} seconds and Slowing enemies by {{ empoweredslowamount }}.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Maokai}} flings a ''Sapling'' to the target location, where it remains for some time. A ''Sapling'' will chase nearby enemies for a short time, expiring afterward or upon contact.
wiki_detail.blurb2: When a ''Sapling'' expires, it deals {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies based on {{as|their '''maximum''' health}} and {{tip|slow|slows}} them for a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb3: A ''Sapling'' placed in {{tip|brush}} will last longer, and deal double damage over 3 bursts.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Maokai''' {{tip|projectile|flings}} a ''Sapling'' to the target location, granting {{tip|sight}} of the {{tt|area|can see across terrain from the center, but not into brush}}.
wiki_detail.description2: Once landed, a ''Sapling'' remains stationary for 30 seconds or until it reacts to the first nearby visible enemy, chasing them for up to {{fd|2.5}} seconds. The ''Sapling'' explodes upon colliding with an enemy or when it expires, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies, capped at 300 against non-champions, and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 45% for 2 seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: A ''Sapling'' placed in {{tip|brush}} instead lasts 30 {{as|(+ {{fd|1.5}}% '''bonus''' health)}} seconds, deals double damage to struck non-{{tip|minion}} targets over 3 bursts, and {{tip|slow|slows}} them by 45% {{as|(+ 1% per 100 '''bonus''' health)}} {{as|(+ 1% per 100 AP)}}, as well as {{tip|standard sight|reveals}} them for 3 seconds. The first instance of damage is dealt instantly and the second and third instances occur each {{fd|0.75}} seconds thereafter. The '''total''' damage is capped at 600 against non-champions.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Total Enhanced Damage|{{ap|50*2 to 150*2}} {{as|(+ {{ap|5*2}}% '''bonus''' health)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|25*2}}% AP)}}|Enhanced Damage Per Tick|{{ap|50*2/3 to 150*2/3|round=2}} {{as|(+ {{ap|5*2/3|round=2}}% '''bonus''' health)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|25*2/3|round=2}}% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tt|175|Damage range}} / {{tt|350|Initial sight range, pending for confirmation}} / {{tt|475|Sight range, while on the ground}}
wiki_detail.speed: {{tt|400 - 460|Sapling movement speed, based on Maokai's boots.}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Applies {{tip|area damage}} from a normal ''Sapling'' and deals {{tip|persistent damage}} to enemies hit by an empowered ''Sapling''.
* ''Saplings'' have a base [[movement speed]] of 400, increased based on '''Maokai's''' [[boots]]:
** {{ii|Boots}}: 425
** {{ii|Berserker's Greaves}}, {{ii|Ionian Boots of Lucidity}}, {{ii|Mercury's Treads}}, {{ii|Plated Steelcaps}} and {{ii|Sorcerer's Shoes}}: 445
** {{ii|Boots of Swiftness}}: 460
* ''Sapling Toss'' grants {{tip|sight}} of the target location even while the ''Sapling'' is in flight.
* The ''Saplings'' will continue to chase their target even if they lose {{tip|sight}} of them (but they do not prioritize champions so they will chase the first target they encounter).
* ''Saplings'' will appear on the map as minions despite being untargetable and invulnerable.
* ''Saplings'' cannot stack on top of each other (they will move a short distance away from one another if they are aimed at the same location).
* The damage of empowered ''Saplings'' is equally split into chunks of {{fd|66.7}}% of the normal ''Sapling'' damage every second, once immediately, and then at the 1 and 2 second mark.
* The ''Sapling'' will stop its movement upon colliding with {{ai|Unbreakable|Braum}}.
* ''Saplings'' attack {{ui|Baron Nashor}} always at the same two points, no matter where they were placed.[[File:Sapling Toss Baron_Nashor.png|center|200px]]

R.name: Nature's Grasp
R.description: Maokai summons a colossal wall of brambles and thorns that slowly advances forwards, damaging and rooting any enemies in the path.
R.tooltip: Maokai summons a colossal wave of brambles and thorns, Rooting enemies for {{ minrootduration }} to {{ maxrootduration }} seconds, increasing with distance travelled, and dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage. Hitting a champion gives Maokai {{ movehaste*100 }}% Move Speed, decaying over {{ hasteduration }} seconds. {{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Maokai}} summons a colossal wall of five thorny brambles that slowly advances in the target direction, each stopping when they collide with an enemy {{tip|champion}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Each bramble deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|root|roots}} them for a short time based on the bramble's distance travelled.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Maokai''' summons a colossal wall of five thorny brambles that slowly advances in the target direction, accelerating over time, each stopping when they collide with an enemy {{tip|champion}}. Hitting at least one enemy champion grants '''Maokai''' {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} decaying over 2 seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: Each bramble deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|root|roots}} them for {{pp|type=distance traveled|0.75 to 2.25|0 to 1000 by 100|formula=Starts at 0.75 seconds and increases up to 2.25 seconds over 1000 units traveled}} seconds.
wiki_detail.speed: {{pp|100;400;700;750|0 to 3|type=seconds active|formula=100 + 300 per second, capped at 750}}
